case_title: JENIFER WAINZ VS. ASAP RELOCATIONS INC

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO DEC-15-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-09-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
